---
title: "Support GPD Américas"
format: html
---

# Support the Generation of Participation in Democracy

Your support enables the development of sustainable, participatory institutions across the Americas. Contributions fund research, field programs, and infrastructure through our flagship institute, Instituto Dourados.

## Contribution Tiers

| Tier     | Minimum Contribution | Description |
|----------|---------------------|-------------|
| Founder  | $1,000,000          | Institutional founding support |
| Platinum | $100,000            | Major program sponsorship |
| Gold     | $10,000             | Program and research support |
| Silver   | $1,000              | Core operational support |
| Reader   | $75/year            | Includes annual journal subscription |
| Hero     | ≥ $1                | Open participation |

The **Reader** tier includes a complimentary yearly subscription to the *Instituto Dourados Quarterly Journal*.

## Donate

:::{.text-center}
[Become a Reader — $75/year](#){.btn target="\_blank"}

[Give $1 or more](#){.btn target="\_blank"}
:::

## Major Contributions

Founder, Platinum, and Gold contributions are coordinated directly to align with specific programs and reporting.

- **GPD Américas — Giving**  
  [giving@gpdamericas.org](mailto:giving@gpdamericas.org)

## Transparency

All contributions are governed under our public benefit mission and transparency principles. Budget allocations and funding scenarios are published on the Instituto Dourados page.

- **GPD Américas — Transparency**  
  [transparency@gpdamericas.org](mailto:transparency@gpdamericas.org)
